programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls takes Tom Arnold (Sons of Anarchy (2008)) through the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon, taking on steep terrain, river crossings and oceanside cliffs. Arnold attempts to channel the courage and determination from his weight-loss struggle in order to tackle a journey that takes him to the brink of mental and physical exhaustion.

programme.title: Facing Forces of Nature
programme.desc: The Sea Level Rise - can humanity stand against this threatening force of nature, or do we have to give up our coastal living space?

programme.title: Down to Earth with Zac Efron - Season 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a devastating bushfire season, Zac and Darin learn about efforts to rehabilitate the wildlife and livestock population.

programme.title: Jet Truck
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy's mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: Jet Truck
programme.desc: The Darnell's celebrate their return home by blowing off some explosive redneck frustration while Brooke tries to keep something very special under wraps.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: With the help of a local Oklahoma guide, Jess sets out to hunt an axis deer, then shares butchery techniques and prepares a delicious backstrap grilled over live fire.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack takes inspiration from the 1700s for his latest adventure. In Darwin, Australia, he gets creative with crocodile and mud crab when he realises he's missed shrimp season.

programme.title: Diamond River Hunters
programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: Facing Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Solar Flares - how can we protect mankind from the next big solar storm?

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn't stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya's spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there's more bad news that could put Sarah's big plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: "The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there's a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai's food offerings.".

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under. Terry will see if he can hit a 564-yard shot with a Sharps rifle and then we will attempt the "Quigley". An 800-yard shot, trying to kill 2 bad guys with 1 bullet!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry, aka Raylan Givins finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him. A woman stands near ready to end his life when Raylan shoots his service revolver through the dead body and into the woman killing her. Terry and Larry will also test to see if they can incapacitate a bad guy by shooting the steering wheel of the ca

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Gill and Paul who are searching for a million dollar property in Benowa Waters on the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Ella and Sa who are searching for a million dollar property in the bay side of Melbourne.

programme.title: Mega Makeover
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel cons

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the Brokk robot versus Brian Shaw, the world's strongest man; the E-One fire truck versus Charlie Hobson, a flamethrower expert; and the Cold Jet ice blaster versus Tuff N Lite fabric.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: Heavy Load
programme.desc: Something is moving through Germany: machines weighing tons on wheels. In Bavaria, huge mobile cranes lift entire bridges in the middle of motorway traffic. In North Rhine-Westphalia, a heavy transport vehicle rolls through narrow villages. In Augsburg, the steel of a crane bends under 10-ton loads. Crane work with millimetre precision, overcoming obstacles on the route and constant time pressure

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected; SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay; Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal, Spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to manage SpongeBob and Squidward's world tour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward bets that SpongeBob can not go one day without crying; Mrs. Puff must work at the Krusty Krab over her summer break.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick think their homes have been sold and move away, pleasing Squidward; fortune cookies predict the future so Plankton uses them for his schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more; SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton follows their every step.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' customers abandon him when SpongeBob starts cooking at home; when Plankton gets kicked out of the house, SpongeBob must teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he will not let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' mother starts to date; SpongeBob wants to make his own version of the "Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy" movie.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fired robot band from Goofy Goober's; Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to find a way to get Squidward to visit him at his home; SpongeBob must search for a new pair of pants after his square pants shrink in the dryer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward jellyfishing; SpongeBob is a victim of Plankton's scheme.

programme.desc: Sandy puts SpongeBob and Patrick in charge of her pet caterpillar; SpongeBob invents colored Krabby patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick gets his license and wins a car; a document reveals that Patrick is next in line to become a king.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared - including SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesn't; Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Crew builds a boat for its penny-pinching captain; SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; Plankton grows a second eye and becomes nice.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: Leonardo lets Raphael try his hand at leadership; Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja.

programme.desc: The team must overcome impossible odds in order to obtain the final Black Hole Generator piece.
